$description: BMW corporate — light canvas + dark navy hero bands + BMW Blue (#1c69d4) sole CTA. BMW Type Next two-weight ladder (700/300). Rectangular IS the brand: 0px on every button/card/input. M-stripe (cyan/violet/red) reserved for M contexts. Generic abstraction — not the licensed BMW brand.

accent.$description: BMW Blue — the sole primary CTA fill. Pulled from BMW DESIGN.md.

highlight.$description: M Blue Light — used in M-stripe trio only.

black.$description: Display + primary text. Soft against photography, not pure black. (== `ink` per BMW DESIGN.md.)

ink.$description: All display + primary text. Soft against photography, not pure black.

graphite.$description: Body strong — emphasized paragraphs, lead text.

fog.$description: 1px hairline divider — input outline, configurator card outline, table separator.

fog-strong.$description: Stronger 1px outline — disabled secondary, emphasized table border.

paper.$description: Canvas — pure white, the brand-defining surface. Dominant across pages.

paper-2.$description: Light plate behind a model card photo block (DESIGN.md `surface-card`).

paper-4.$description: Slightly heavier grey — section divider band (DESIGN.md `surface-strong`).

off-white.$description: On-dark text — pure white on dark navy hero band.

off-white-2.$description: On-dark soft — secondary text on dark hero (DESIGN.md `on-dark-soft`).

surface-dark.$description: Dark navy hero band — warm-undertone navy, NOT pure black. Used for hero / CTA bands only.

surface-dark-elevated.$description: Nested cards on top of the dark hero.

surface-dark-soft.$description: Soft dark band variant for chapter sections.

surface-cream-strong.$description: Strongest cream — emphasized bands (alias of paper-4).

font-family.$description: BMW Type Next Latin in two weights: 700 display + 300 Light body. Inter is the documented open-source substitute (DESIGN.md). System sans tail for portability.

font-weight.$description: Two-weight ladder: 700 display + 300 body. Weight 500 is intentionally absent. 400 only for caption + nav.

light.$description: Body — BMW Type Next Latin Light. Editorial signature.

medium.$description: Absent from BMW system. Do not use for new UI.

font-size.$description: Sizes scaled to the 1920x1080 deck baseline; ratios mirror BMW DESIGN.md web hierarchy.

slide-title.$description: Hero h1 — DESIGN.md display-xl. 700 weight, 1.05 line-height.

body.$description: Default body — DESIGN.md body-md scaled. 300 weight.

kpi-value.$description: Hero spec value. 700 weight. Scaled to fit 4-up grid in 1680px content width.

chip.$description: LEARN MORE › inline link — 700 / UPPERCASE / 1.5px tracking.

radius.$description: Rectangular IS the brand for BMW. 0px on every button/card/input is non-negotiable. Circular reserved for icon buttons. The `btn`, `chip`, and `card` slots are policy hooks read by `add_rounded_rect` — Spotify will set these to pill/9999 to opt into rounded geometry without changing renderer code.

chip.$description: Chip / tag corner radius. BMW=0. Spotify=9999.

card.$description: Card / surface corner radius. BMW=0. Spotify=8.

padding-x.$description: Wider margin echoing BMW's 80px section spacing scaled to 1920w.

layout.$description: BMW DESIGN.md layout policy — 12-col editorial grid, 80px section rhythm, 24px card padding.

section-spacing.$description: Major editorial band rhythm. Tighter than BMW M's 96px.

hairline-weight.$description: 1px hairline divider — input outlines, table rows, configurator borders.

stripe-height.$description: M-stripe divider height — fixed across breakpoints.

cover.$description: Cover treatment policy — light canvas hairline-header with dark navy hero band roughly 60% down.

hero-band-height-pct.$description: Dark band occupies bottom 42% of slide.

section-marker.$description: Section divider policy — 4px M-stripe (m-blue-light → m-blue-dark → m-red). Used at chapter dividers and major editorial breaks. Reserved meaning — not decoration.

photography.$description: BMW photography policy — edge-to-edge, no shadow. Depth comes from color-block contrast (light canvas vs dark hero). Hero ratio 16:9 / 21:9 cinematic; cards 16:10.

headline-rule.$description: Display headlines run BMW Type Next 700 with tracking 0. NO negative letter-spacing — Apple-style tightening reads off-brand. Body always 300 Light.

chip-rule.$description: LEARN MORE ›-style inline link. UPPERCASE 13px 700 1.5px tracking, terminated with ›.
